agency_model.decision: Agency remains a constitutional principle, not an executable runtime principal
agency_model.rationale: Avoid introducing unnecessary authority layers while preserving balanced representation.

collective_agency_definition.description: aigentC represents collective interests including customers, contributors, builders, communities, citizens, and ecosystem participants.
collective_agency_definition.note: Customer remains a valid commercial interpretation but collective agency is the constitutional framing.

myGuard.purpose: Protect sovereignty, consent, policy boundaries, and bounded delegation.

aigentMe.purpose: Represent individual sovereignty and personal agency.

aigentC.purpose: Represent collective interests and customer/community sovereignty.

aigentZ.purpose: Represent platform interests, fulfillment, continuity, operations, and development.

operation_chrysalis.objective: Transform AgentiQ into the sovereign fulfillment wing of the ecosystem.
phase_1: All development requests routed through aigentZ

aigent_definition.description: A polity-compliant AI agent holding a valid Participant Passport.

implementation_tasks: Add governance navigation section to AgentiQ OS cartridge ✅
Add passported aigent identity support (classification in sovereignAgentRoles.ts) ✅
Add participant passport VC integration (Phase A complete in services/passport/)
non_goals: Do not create Agency as a runtime principal
Do not collapse Me, C, and Z into a single agent
Do not make passport issuance mandatory for generic AI agents
Do not expose blakQube identity data publicly
